author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: v0.8.0 GitHub release published at https://github.com/forecast-bio/crosslink/releases/tag/v0.8.0. Tag v0.8.0 already existed on remote pointing at merge commit 12eb7b91 (PR #567); only the Release was missing. Created release with title 'v0.8.0 — sentinel autonomous maintenance agent' and notes extracted from CHANGELOG.md v0.8.0 section. Marked Latest, replacing v0.7.0.
